message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
}

package "Documents" as docs {
  interface Document
  class StringDocument
  class URLDocument
  class FileDocument
}

package "Indexes" as indexes {
  interface SimilarityIndex
  class CachingSimilarityIndex
  class JaacardIndex
}

package "Shingles" as shingles {
  interface Shinglizer
  class WordShinglizer
}

package "MinHash" as minhash {
  class HashGenerator
  class MinHash
}

' Relationships
StringDocument ..|> Document
URLDocument ..|> Document
FileDocument ..|> Document

CachingSimilarityIndex ..|> SimilarityIndex
JaacardIndex ..|> SimilarityIndex

WordShinglizer ..|> Shinglizer

JaacardIndex o-- Shinglizer
JaacardIndex *-- HashGenerator
JaacardIndex *-- MinHash

SimilarityIndex o-- Document

' Styling for interfaces and classes
interface Document #LightPink
interface SimilarityIndex #LightGreen
interface Shinglizer #LightBlue

class StringDocument #LightGreen
class URLDocument #LightGreen
class FileDocument #LightGreen
class CachingSimilarityIndex #LightGreen
class JaacardIndex #LightGreen
class WordShinglizer #LightGreen
class HashGenerator #LightGreen
class MinHash #LightGreen

@enduml
```
